metadata_oracle_risk.description: Diagnostic upper-bound model that is allowed to see controlled stressor metadata. It should not be treated as deployable risk perception.

structured_progress_risk.description: Deployable structured baseline using task/language hashes, action horizon, and early rollout progress statistics, with hidden stressor metadata removed.

vision_language_risk.description: Deployable frozen SigLIP first-frame image-embedding ablation. It combines observable structured/progress features with compact VLM image features extracted from rollout videos, and it does not use hidden stressor metadata.

adaptive_chunk_openpi_offline.note: Risk changes estimated action horizon and policy-query overhead only; success labels are not resimulated.

adaptive_chunk_plus_abort_offline.note: Combines adaptive horizon overhead estimate with the same prefix no-progress abort rule.

early_abort_on_no_progress_offline.note: Aborts episodes whose first logged prefix has high no-progress; not a resimulated controller result.

fixed_task_prior_selective.note: Offline selective execution using per-suite/task training priors.

global_prior_selective.note: Offline selective execution using the global training failure prior.

metadata_oracle_risk_selective.note: Offline selective execution using `metadata_oracle_risk` risk scores.

structured_progress_risk_selective.note: Offline selective execution using `structured_progress_risk` risk scores.

vision_language_risk_selective.note: Offline selective execution using frozen SigLIP image-embedding risk scores.

open_source_stack.lerobot: Planned export/baseline path; not used for the current risk numbers.
open_source_stack.openpi: Primary robot foundation/VLA policy, using pi05_libero.
open_source_stack.vlm_features: Frozen SigLIP first-frame image embeddings from logged rollout videos are trained as `vision_language_risk`; no stressor metadata is used.
open_source_stack.world_model_features: Current structured model uses early transition/progress statistics as a lightweight world-model proxy; learned predictive dynamics are a planned ablation.

runtime_evaluation.interpretation: Runtime SigLIP selective supervision reduces failure among attempted OpenPI/LIBERO episodes. A task-disjoint runtime calibration/test threshold sweep finds utility-positive operating points, with the 75% calibration target giving the best test utility in the paired runtime sweep.

runtime_threshold_sweep.counterfactual_note: Thresholds are selected from runtime calibration risk scores. Test outcomes use paired direct_openpi episodes when a threshold would attempt, and a 10-step runtime-prefix abstention proxy when it would reject.
runtime_threshold_sweep.evaluation_type: paired runtime SigLIP risk scores with paired real direct OpenPI outcomes for accepted attempts

split.threshold_selection: target coverage thresholds selected only on calibration examples

supervisor_offline.interpretation: Episodes with calibrated p_failure >= threshold are abstained in this offline coverage analysis.
